nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy. Low around 77, with temperatures rising to around 79 overnight. South wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between 7am and 1pm, then showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy. High near 82, with temperatures falling to around 77 in the afternoon. South wind 10 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms

East northeast wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.
